---
title: "Course 3: Deploying TinyML"
---

```{=html}
<!-- Base URL for all TinyML courseware PDFs — change here if the source repo moves -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var BASE = 'https://github.com/tinyMLx/courseware/raw/master/edX';
  document.querySelectorAll('a[data-tinyml]').forEach(function(a) {
    a.href = BASE + '/' + a.getAttribute('data-tinyml');
    a.target = '_blank';
  });
});
</script>

<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="tinyml.html" class="btn-outline">← Back to TinyML Overview</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/MLSysBook-TinyML-All.zip" class="btn-accent" target="_blank">Download All (ZIP)</a>
  <a href="https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">edX Course</a>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 4: Deploying TinyML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 4 · Course 3</span>
  <h3>Deploying TinyML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">End-to-end deployment with TensorFlow Lite for Microcontrollers. Covers embedded hardware/software, TFLite Micro internals, and hands-on labs deploying keyword spotting, visual wake words, and gesture recognition on Arduino.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 11, 13</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Arduino &amp; Seeed Kits</a></span>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.1 Welcome to Deploying TinyML</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-1-1.pdf">Welcome to TinyML3</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-2.pdf">Welcome Message from VJ</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-1-3.pdf">Course 1 and 2 Recap</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-6.pdf">TinyML Application Deployment Preview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-1-7.pdf">The TinyML Kit</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-8.pdf">TinyML Course Kit Overview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-1-11.pdf">How the Course is Structured</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.2 Getting Started</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-2.pdf">C++ for Python Users</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-3.pdf">Setting up your Hardware</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-5.pdf">Setting up your Software</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-8.pdf">The Arduino Blink Example</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-10.pdf">Testing the TensorFlow Install</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-2-13.pdf">Testing the Sensors</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.3 Embedded Hardware and Software</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-1.pdf">Embedded System</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-2.pdf">Diversity of Embedded Systems</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-3.pdf">Embedded Computing Hardware</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-4.pdf">Diversity of Embedded Microcontrollers</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-5.pdf">Embedded I/O</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-6.pdf">Transducer Modules and Wireless Communication</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-8.pdf">Embedded System Software</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-3-9.pdf">Arduino cores, frameworks, mbedOS, and 'bare metal'</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-3-10.pdf">Embedded ML Software</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.4 TensorFlow Lite Micro</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-4-1.pdf">What is TensorFlow Lite for Microcontrollers?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-2.pdf">TFMicro: The Big Picture</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-5.pdf">TFLite Micro: Interpreter</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-4-6.pdf">MCU Memory Hierarchy</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-7.pdf">TFLite Micro: Model Format / FlatBuffer</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/4-4-8-Flatbuffers.ipynb" target="_blank">TensorFlow Lite Flatbuffer Manipulation Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-10.pdf">TFLite Micro: Memory Allocation (Tensor Arena)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-4-11.pdf">TFLite Micro: NN Operator Support (OpsResolver)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-4-12.pdf">TFLite Micro Developer Design Principles</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.5 Keyword Spotting</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-5-1.pdf">TinyML "Keyword Spotting" Workflow</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-2.pdf">KWS Application Architecture</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-3.pdf">KWS Initialization</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-6.pdf">KWS Pre-processing</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-9.pdf">KWS Inference</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-12.pdf">KWS Post-processing</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-5-14.pdf">KWS Summary</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.6 Custom Dataset Engineering for Keyword Spotting</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-1.pdf">Recap Dataset Engineering</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-6-2.pdf">Introducing Custom Dataset for KWS</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-3.pdf">Things to Consider for Your Data Collection Plan</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-6.pdf">Building a Custom Dataset</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-6-8.pdf">Train and Deploy Your Custom Dataset KWS Model</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.7 Visual Wake Words</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-7-1.pdf">Recap: What are Visual Wake Words?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-2.pdf">Person Detection Application Architecture</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-5.pdf">Person Detection with KWS: MultiModal</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-6.pdf">Person Detection with KWS: MultiTenancy</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-7-8.pdf">MultiTenancy in TensorFlow Lite Micro</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-7-9.pdf">Deploying the Pretrained Person Detection Model</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-7-11.pdf">Deploying a Multi-Tenant Application</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.8 Gesture Recognition — Magic Wand</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-1.pdf">Recap: Time Series for Anomaly Detection</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-8-2.pdf">TinyML Sensor Ecosystem</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-3.pdf">Anatomy of an IMU</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-8-4.pdf">Magic Wand Application</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-8-5.pdf">Magic Wand Application Architecture</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-6.pdf">Understanding the Magic Wand Application</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-8.pdf">Deploying the Magic Wand</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-10.pdf">Collecting Data for Your Custom Magic Wand Project</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-8-12.pdf">Training and Deploying Your Custom Magic Wand Project</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.9 Responsible AI Deployment</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-9-1.pdf">Privacy</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/4-9-3.pdf">Privacy</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-9-4.pdf">Security</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/4-9-6-Attacking-KWSModel.ipynb" target="_blank">Attacking a KWS Model in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-9-8.pdf">Why do ML Models Fail after Deployment?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-9-9.pdf">Monitoring after Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§4.10 Summary</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-10-1.pdf">Congratulations! You Made it to the Finish Line!</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-10-2.pdf">What Comes Next: Advanced Topics in TinyML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/4-10-3.pdf">What Do I Do Now?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/4-10-4.pdf">TinyMLx Project Extension (Optional)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-note}
These materials were originally developed for the [HarvardX Professional Certificate in Tiny Machine Learning](https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning) on edX. See the [original curriculum](tinyml/README-edx-original.md) for the full item-by-item breakdown including forum prompts and quizzes not listed above.
:::
